reviews.review_description: I did not open the game I don't know if it's good or not but don't waste your time by installing it

Consider what VR is.... Immersion, social and fantasy. Meta table has all that and then some!!! I have purchased every game available and found myself spending the majority of VR time in Meta Table. What an emotional, exhaustive ride this game delivers. If you ever wondered how it feels to play against other players, trying to catch their bluffs as well as trying to catch cards, this game delivers. And if you happen to read other reviews that has fallen short of a 5 star rating, then download this game and ask anyone who frequents this game. I’ll doubt you’ll hear complaints.
Keeps improving and a good core community of players

This game charges you to play by the hour. At $5 and up depending on how many hours you buy in to. With no way to purchase the other cooler backgrounds. On top of that all of the backgrounds are still images making the table look like it’s levitating and really far away from the ground. The performance is buggy and the cpu seems to be rigged. First time I played I wiped the floor with the cpu, the next time I turned it on after 7 games it whooped me and tried to make me blow all of my money. Unless you’re looking for a free single player poker game that’s slightly unfair avoid.
This game is super fun and it's free to play.  I like meeting and talking to new players and playing the game with them ijn realtime.

I was playing this game up until a couple weeks ago. I’ve even went to the extent of factory, resetting my oculus go and reinstalling the app to no avail. It keeps stating I need to log into oculus, but I am logged into oculus.

reviews.review_title: I want to like thos game but
reviews.review_description: It's very laggy and the music i wish it would remember your settings. However its playable and sometimes fun.
Purchase chips took money no chips....

One of the best VR poker games.  I don't understand the reviews that say you have to spend money or pay by the hour.  You get free chips to start which lasted me a couple weeks and when I lost, I was given more the next day.  You can of course buy chips if you run out and don't want to wait a day.
I love the game, but it does have some technical issues that need to be fixed.  First people are always under the table, you can raise your chair, but you don't know you're under the table unless someone tells you because it appears normal from your view, secondly it freezes up frequently on Oculus Go.  Lastly, please have tournaments, Oculus announces a tournament almost daily, but every time I go there at the specified time, either there is no tournament or it says cancelled.  
This game is not as polished as Poker VR and has less players, but it's more social and fun to play and talk to other players.
It should be rated higher than it is.  Give it a try.
It stinks there is no teleportation and no guns

This is the more f2p friendly poker if you're looking to spend time instead of money. I have been playing for a small amount of time and I've been breaking about even. The game feels alright, graphics aren't all that great but the gameplay itself is what matters and it works, you have a $100 buy in table and that'll keep you in for a decent amount of time if you play it safe all without buying chips. I am thinking about purchasing chips in the future though, I've enjoyed my experience so far and I'd like to support this game.  I have two ideas though, character customization and maybe a daily login bonus, nothing big, just a couple ideas. Great job devs.

I had about 360000, then mid game , it glitches and said to buy in and all I have is 66k. It just came up with that number somehow. My dad plays as well and watched it happen from across the table. Don't download this app, get poker VR. At least it doesn't just jack your stacks. (Update) they made it right within a couple hours. Respect to the metapoker team! I thank you and fully retract the last review.
